concept_decisions.labels_compared: triangulation_cross_system vs mixed_methods_measurement_triangulation vs causal_cross_design_triangulation vs modelled_observed_triangulation vs specification_curve_multiverse vs denominator_population_sensitivity
concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: 35 titles and complete available abstracts assigned to triangulation_cross_system in CONCEPT-BATCH-007_RECORDS.csv
concept_decisions.rationale: Most assigned records integrate multiple routine, surveillance, programmatic, or cohort data sources to reconcile coverage, burden, safety, or epidemic patterns; mixed-methods, causal-design, model-vs-observed, robustness, and geometric uses of triangulation are distinct and reassigned.

concept_decisions.labels_compared: denominator_population_sensitivity vs population_size_estimation_hidden_populations vs outcome_definition_sensitivity vs systematic_review_meta_analysis vs passive_safety_surveillance_rate_denominators
concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: 45 titles and complete available abstracts assigned to denominator_population_sensitivity in CONCEPT-BATCH-007_RECORDS.csv
concept_decisions.rationale: The dominant pattern is correction, validation, or choice of denominators for incidence, coverage, positivity, and risk estimation in surveillance or registries; hidden-population estimation, passive-safety denominator problems, formal evidence syntheses, and non-denominator trial designs are distinct.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: No manifested records were assigned to hierarchical_borrowing in CONCEPT-BATCH-007_RECORDS.csv
concept_decisions.rationale: No inspected batch record provided positive evidence to collapse hierarchical borrowing into another concept, so its distinct concept status remains unchanged on batch-local evidence.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: Zero directly assigned records plus reassigned model-informed triangulation records from triangulation_cross_system
concept_decisions.rationale: The reassigned records specifically compare model-based and observed-data evidence for the same policy or epidemiologic question, which is narrower than generic data triangulation and distinct from studies that merely append forecasts to an impact evaluation.

concept_decisions.retained_canonical_name: Multisource data fusion for prediction and surveillance
concept_decisions.labels_compared: evidence_robustness_methods vs statistical_data_fusion_estimation_and_bridging vs ai_ml_infectious_disease_diagnosis_forecasting_reviews vs nlp_policy_and_literature_mapping vs preparedness_and_intelligence_synthesis
concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: 36 titles and complete available abstracts assigned to evidence_robustness_methods in CONCEPT-BATCH-007_RECORDS.csv
concept_decisions.rationale: Most assigned records build predictive, diagnostic, or surveillance systems by fusing heterogeneous data streams; statistical fusion theory papers, broad AI reviews, text-mining syntheses, preparedness scans, and other one-off methods are distinct and reassigned.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: 3 directly assigned titles and complete available abstracts plus related reassigned denominator records
concept_decisions.rationale: The shared core is sensitivity of effect, severity, or burden estimates to outcome definition, case classification, or nondifferential outcome misclassification; this is distinct from generic denominator calibration.

concept_decisions.retained_canonical_name: Specification-curve, multiverse, and multi-model robustness analysis
concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: 2 directly assigned titles and complete available abstracts plus reassigned multi-model triangulation records
concept_decisions.rationale: The common design feature is evaluating robustness across many reasonable analytic specifications or model classes; the added lameness records fit this robustness family better than generic cross-system triangulation.

concept_decisions.retained_canonical_name: Systematic review, meta-analysis, and individual-participant-data synthesis
concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: Zero directly assigned records plus reassigned formal systematic reviews, meta-analyses, and IPD syntheses from denominator_population_sensitivity
concept_decisions.rationale: Several reassigned records are formal systematic reviews, random-effects meta-analyses, or IPD syntheses; these should be grouped explicitly rather than left under denominator-related routing.

reassignments.rationale: It triangulates multiple estimators to infer MSM population size, so the estimand is hidden-population size rather than generic public-health triangulation.
It integrates qualitative and quantitative process-evaluation findings with a formal triangulation protocol.
It synthesizes a systematic review, qualitative interviews, and survey experiment findings through a triangulation protocol.
A treatment-cascade model is built from triangulated observed data to reconcile program evidence and modeled targets.
The paper explicitly argues for causal triangulation across RCTs and observational studies with different bias structures.
The core design compares three measurement instruments for the same sensitive behavior outcome.
It triangulates ethnographic observation and interviews to explain prescribing culture.
The substantive method is coverage correction using duplicate-reporting, migration, and population-denominator adjustments.
It triangulates cohort, self-controlled case series, and population time-trend analyses for the same vaccine-safety question.
The main design is denominator-based positivity analysis to separate true incidence change from changing test volume.
It combines a test-negative design with separate population-control comparisons to identify exposure-specific risks.
Back-calculation models are explicitly triangulated against programmatic data to interpret epidemic dynamics.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Specification-curve, multiverse, and multi-model robustness analysis
reassignments.rationale: The method identifies robust predictors by comparing results across several model classes.
Here triangulation is a geometric image-processing device, not evidence integration.
It triangulates cohort associations with Mendelian-randomization evidence for the same safety question.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Integrated impact evaluation with microsimulation forecasting
reassignments.rationale: The design integrates retrospective impact estimation with forward microsimulation under policy scenarios.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Integrated impact evaluation with microsimulation forecasting
reassignments.rationale: The study is an IPTW-based impact evaluation with ancillary robustness analyses, not a triangulation-centered design.
It directly compares DID estimates with a compartmental model for the same indirect-effect estimand and reconciles them via bias analysis.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Integrated impact evaluation with microsimulation forecasting
reassignments.rationale: The core method is a retrospective panel impact evaluation linked to mortality forecasting under defunding scenarios.
The study uses a concurrent triangulation design combining records review with FGDs and IDIs.
It pairs cross-sectional microbiome profiling with Mendelian-randomization and mediation analyses to triangulate causality.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Specification-curve, multiverse, and multi-model robustness analysis
reassignments.rationale: The method uses stability selection and triangulation across alternative model-selection procedures to reduce overfitting.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Integrated impact evaluation with microsimulation forecasting
reassignments.rationale: The design couples retrospective aid-mortality estimation with future mortality projections under funding scenarios.
The central issue is case-fatality estimation under alternative definitions of who counts as infected.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Systematic review, meta-analysis, and individual-participant-data synthesis
reassignments.rationale: This is a formal systematic review and pooled meta-analysis of neonatal pSBI incidence and case fatality.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Passive vaccine-safety rate estimation with incomplete denominators
reassignments.rationale: Adverse-event rates are derived from passive reports using doses distributed as an imperfect exposure denominator.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Systematic review, meta-analysis, and individual-participant-data synthesis
reassignments.rationale: This is a systematic review with pooled meta-analytic incidence estimates for maternal GBS disease.
The Anchored Multiplier is a dedicated hidden-population size-estimation method.
The operative design is an adaptive multi-arm, multi-stage cluster randomized trial.
The paper estimates local MSM population size to construct infection-rate denominators.
The main contribution is comparative risk modeling to prioritize TB versus MRSA screening.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Passive vaccine-safety rate estimation with incomplete denominators
reassignments.rationale: Its central problem is lack of reliable exposure denominators in pharmacovigilance databases.
The paper is about changing sepsis case ascertainment and coding definitions rather than denominator correction.
The SAAR is a specialized benchmarking metric with modeled predicted antimicrobial-days denominators.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Digital surveillance systems and network-based monitoring
reassignments.rationale: The main design is a real-time hospital-onset surveillance system with geotemporal network analysis.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Systematic review, meta-analysis, and individual-participant-data synthesis
reassignments.rationale: This is a global systematic review and random-effects meta-analysis of HCV service-delivery models.
The estimand changes across clinically, radiologically, and etiologically confirmed outcome definitions.
The core design is a factorial cluster randomized trial about sustaining testing behavior.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Passive vaccine-safety rate estimation with incomplete denominators
reassignments.rationale: It estimates safety reporting rates from VAERS and v-safe using administered doses as exposure denominators.
The operative design is a nationwide stepped-wedge time-series evaluation of UV-C disinfection.
The title's denominator language is idiomatic; the actual design is a qualitative literature review of trust and vaccine acceptance.
The operative design is an efficient cluster randomized trial of antibiotic stewardship.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Systematic review, meta-analysis, and individual-participant-data synthesis
reassignments.rationale: This is an IPD systematic review and Bayesian meta-analysis of diagnostic yield.
The method is a supervised classifier for reemergence events rather than robustness analysis or data fusion.
It inventories population-enumeration data sources needed to construct homeless-population denominators.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Statistical data fusion and bridged estimation
reassignments.rationale: The paper develops tail-probability estimation by formally fusing multiple small samples.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Statistical data fusion and bridged estimation
reassignments.rationale: It proposes Bayesian data fusion for pooled and individual samples to estimate prevalence efficiently.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: AI/ML infectious-disease diagnosis and forecasting reviews
reassignments.rationale: This is a narrative review of AI and ML applications in infectious-disease testing.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: AI/ML infectious-disease diagnosis and forecasting reviews
reassignments.rationale: The paper is a review of intelligent fish-disease diagnosis methods, not a primary fusion analysis.
Its core method is content mining and quantitative policy-text evaluation.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: AI/ML infectious-disease diagnosis and forecasting reviews
reassignments.rationale: This is a review of AI and ML diagnosis methods for infections in immunocompromised patients.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Statistical data fusion and bridged estimation
reassignments.rationale: The article is a general semiparametric efficiency theory paper for estimation under data fusion.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Statistical data fusion and bridged estimation
reassignments.rationale: It develops bridged treatment comparisons by fusing linked trials under explicit identification assumptions.
The study is a jurisdictional scan and narrative synthesis of preparedness mechanisms.
The contribution is a causal roadmap for provisional approval using surrogate endpoints and transported outcome models.
It uses transformer-based language modeling and clustering to map a national AMR literature corpus.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: AI/ML infectious-disease diagnosis and forecasting reviews
reassignments.rationale: The paper is an overview of machine-learning approaches for early disease diagnosis.
This is a broad methods review on spatial epidemiology rather than a primary data-fusion analysis.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: AI/ML infectious-disease diagnosis and forecasting reviews
reassignments.rationale: The article reviews AI and machine-learning approaches to influenza forecasting.
The design is a thematic synthesis of multi-source public-health intelligence outputs.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Digital surveillance systems and network-based monitoring
reassignments.rationale: The paper describes a standardized digital wastewater-surveillance information system, not a predictive fusion model.

new_concepts.rationale: Created for studies that reconcile qualitative and quantitative findings or compare multiple measurement instruments for the same construct.
Created for records that deliberately combine designs with different bias structures to strengthen causal interpretation.
Created for methods whose primary estimand is the size of a hard-to-enumerate population used as a downstream denominator.

new_concepts.canonical_name: Integrated impact evaluation with microsimulation forecasting
new_concepts.rationale: Created for studies that estimate historical intervention effects and then project counterfactual future outcomes under policy scenarios.
Created for geometric triangulation used as an image-feature construction method rather than an evidence-integration framework.

new_concepts.canonical_name: Passive vaccine-safety rate estimation with incomplete denominators
new_concepts.rationale: Created for safety-surveillance studies where adverse-event rates rely on incomplete or proxy exposure denominators.
Created for records whose core design is a cluster-randomized trial rather than a denominator method.
Created for records that model competing screening priorities and compare expected public-health consequences.
Created for the specialized SAAR framework, which is a benchmarking and stewardship metric rather than a generic denominator study.

new_concepts.canonical_name: Digital surveillance systems and network-based monitoring
new_concepts.rationale: Created for records centered on building or operating digital surveillance infrastructures, dashboards, or network-aware monitoring systems.
Created for quasi-experimental intervention evaluations using stepped-wedge or comparable longitudinal rollout designs.
Created for reviews centered on trust as the principal explanatory construct in vaccine acceptance.
Created for classifier-based detection of reemergence events as a distinct machine-learning design concept.

new_concepts.canonical_name: Statistical data fusion and bridged estimation
new_concepts.rationale: Created for formal statistical methods that fuse partially observed datasets or bridged trials under explicit identification assumptions.

new_concepts.canonical_name: AI/ML infectious-disease diagnosis and forecasting reviews
new_concepts.rationale: Created for review articles surveying AI/ML methods for infectious-disease diagnosis, testing, or forecasting.
Created for records that mine policy or publication corpora with NLP or related quantitative text-analysis workflows.
Created for jurisdictional scans or thematic syntheses that integrate preparedness or public-health-intelligence materials.
Created for methodological work using surrogate endpoints and transported outcome models to support causal decisions.
Created for broad methods reviews on spatial epidemiology rather than primary infectious-disease fusion analyses.

concerns: hierarchical_borrowing had zero manifested records in this batch, so its retain decision is batch-local and unsupported by direct positive examples here.
